---
title: "v4_s4_grad_mu"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Description

Gradient-conditioning ablation for the v4 residual FM U-Net.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Architecture | CNO v2_loggrad + U-Net FM |
| Added condition | `grad_mu` |
| Objective | Flow Matching on `HR - mu` |
| Motivation | expose CNO front locations and sharp gradients |
| Research inspiration | physically informed conditioning for downscaling |

## Variables

::: {.panel-tabset}
### thetao
::: {.figure-grid}
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR / CNO / CNO+FM
`assets/figures/v4_s4_grad_mu/thetao/presentation.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR-LR / CNO Residual / FM Residual
`assets/figures/v4_s4_grad_mu/thetao/residuals.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### CNO Error / FM Error
`assets/figures/v4_s4_grad_mu/thetao/errors.png`
:::
:::
### so
`assets/figures/v4_s4_grad_mu/so/`
### zos
`assets/figures/v4_s4_grad_mu/zos/`
### uo
`assets/figures/v4_s4_grad_mu/uo/`
### vo
`assets/figures/v4_s4_grad_mu/vo/`
:::

## Metrics

`assets/metrics/v4_s4_grad_mu.csv`
